purpose: Compact index of the MEA functional-reproduction evidence boundary; not a paper-results table.

source_evidence.snapshot_commit_resolution: Run git rev-parse HEAD after checkout; this file does not self-assert its containing commit.

paper_method_contract_audit.claim_boundary: Executable functional-contract audit; not a paper-scale validity or performance result.

tracked_compact_live_bundle.claim_boundary: A committed single-seed N=1-per-variant mechanism demonstration, not a stability or broad-generalization result.

taskgen_resolution.identity: exact executable semantic key excluding Query wording and proposal_id
taskgen_resolution.artifact_write_timing: computed before provider; saved only after successful run materialization
taskgen_resolution.limitation: Official and built-in routes execute the upstream trusted capability choice. The force-codegen branch has an exact reviewed lookup interface, but normal runtime has no persistent registry callback/materializer and is not yet a global retrieve-first selector.

taskgen_success_method.act_eligible_envelope: bbh.official_capability; official-equivalent all logic, actor bindings, 0.02 m thresholds and contact
taskgen_success_method.development_only_envelope: bbh.development_fixture; bounded thresholds and all/any, act_eligible=false
taskgen_success_method.limitation: v2 proves a bounded DSL/compiler with fixtures. Non-official semantics are prohibited from ACT and do not yet prove live Proposal-derived success generation.

task_generation_attempt.limitation: The controller executes typed fixture diagnosis and repair callbacks, but all production TaskGen branches are not yet routed through it.

evaluation_graph.scope: optional cross-checkpoint portfolio with at most two ACT child nodes, one active aspect and N=1 round per node
evaluation_graph.coverage_semantics: required and uncovered include only activated nodes; skipped conditional nodes remain conditional_not_activated
evaluation_graph.limitation: The CLI emits and adjudicates inert child commands but does not yet launch live children automatically; this is not the paper core single-task loop.

dynamic_decisions: round_1 sufficient evidence -> continue/drill_down to required counterfactual
round_2 sufficient evidence and exhausted suite -> stop
artifacts.limitation: This N=1 pair proves the registered ACT/Tool/VQA execution path and exact same-seed conclusion agreement, but it exposed that the registered dynamic command still skipped the common AdaptivePlanStepAgent. Source and server regressions now initialize its trusted catalog and provider as a pair; a new clean-head live N=1 remains required. The frozen two-candidate scope also provides no efficiency gain and cannot support Tables 1-2.
This is a zero-ACT inventory of completed real-simulator artifacts from multiple commits. It validates artifact availability, not a strict same-commit Tables 7-8 suite or independent human labels.
This validates Query-conditioned PlanStep control flow using a live provider and cached real evidence. It is not a new integrated TaskGen/ACT/Tool/VQA runtime execution or a policy result.

server_only_evidence.availability_note: validation_runs and raw evaluation artifacts are not Git-tracked; re-run their validators on the canonical server before citing them as current after environment changes.

reproduction_status.functional: The single-task open-query loop has a common evidence-conditioned dynamic step in normal runtime, plus bounded Task/Tool proposals, capability-bound Task resolution, TaskGen, ACT, Rule Tool, Dynamic VQA and final feedback. Reviewed generated-task retrieval remains an interface rather than a configured production registry. Registered adaptive source now initializes the trusted catalog and provider as a pair, but its completed strict N=1 pair predates that final wiring and used the legacy task-specific decision path; a clean-head public-step live acceptance remains open. EvaluationGraph remains an optional cross-checkpoint portfolio.
reproduction_status.experimental: Not reproduced at paper scale: ACT only, mostly N=1, proxy rather than independent human gold, limited task/aspect coverage, no efficiency gain in the newest strict pair, and no complete multi-policy or repeated benchmark tables.
highest_priority_gaps: add a persistent reviewed generated-task registry/materializer so an exact hit truly reuses task.py, VariantSpec, SuccessSpec and validation without a provider
route production TaskGen branches through the bounded TaskGenerationAttempt controller instead of limiting it to fixtures

run one clean-head registered AdaptivePlanStep N=1 acceptance, then design a fair optional-counterfactual Query/suite where real evidence can legitimately stop or change direction before discussing efficiency
add an explicitly authorized success-semantics-variation capability and oracle before any live non-official SuccessSpec claim
replace assistant-proxy labels with independent human gold before paper-style Planner/VQA claims
